welcome.title: Welcome to Metamates
welcome.subtitle: Private inspiration repo + thinking engine
welcome.desktopNote: Ideas live in a folder on your computer; the engine on the right starts with AI chat.

features.agent: Engine — chat with AI on the right; that’s the main entry
features.commands: One command (e.g. /today) = engine reads your repo and writes results
features.vault: Private repo — fragments, diary, clips as local Markdown
features.capture: Phone can drop ideas into your inbox

workspace.title: Choose a notes folder
workspace.description: AI reads and writes in this folder. On first run we create diary, project, and inbox folders for you.
workspace.skillsSynced: Synced {{count}} workspace template item(s) (memory index & skills)
workspace.desktopOnly: This step is for the desktop app only

agent.title: Connect an AI assistant
agent.description: This is the key step. Once connected, talk in the panel on the right — AI can organize, summarize, and update your notes.
agent.none: None found yet — you can install one below
agent.skipHint: Skip for now and connect from the panel on the right
agent.connectLater: After entering the app, start chatting in the AI panel on the right

complete.title: You’re set
complete.subtitle: Pick an AI on the right and send your first message.
